things.name: Edinburgh Castle
things.description: Dramatic fortress on Castle Rock housing the Scottish Crown Jewels and Stone of Destiny

things.name: Arthur's Seat
things.description: Ancient volcano in Holyrood Park offering panoramic views of the city

things.name: Royal Mile
things.description: Historic thoroughfare connecting the castle to Holyrood Palace lined with shops and closes

things.name: Palace of Holyroodhouse
things.description: Official Scottish residence of the British monarch with abbey ruins

things.name: National Museum of Scotland
things.description: World-class collection exploring Scotland's history, culture and the natural world

things.name: Scottish National Gallery
things.description: Outstanding collection of European and Scottish paintings in a neoclassical building

things.name: Greyfriars Kirkyard
things.description: Historic churchyard famous for Greyfriars Bobby and eerie covenanter history

things.name: Camera Obscura
things.description: Victorian optical illusion attraction with rooftop views over the Old Town

things.name: Princes Street Gardens
things.description: Beautiful valley gardens beneath the castle with the Scott Monument

things.name: Royal Botanic Garden
things.description: World-famous garden with 13,000 plant species and stunning glasshouses
